title: My profile
subtitle: Manage your account and personal information.
completenessHint: Complete your profile to unlock all features.

photo.hint: JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
photo.dragHint: or drag and drop a file here

validation.type: Profile photo must be a JPG, PNG or WebP image.
validation.size: Profile photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
validation.extensionMismatch: File extension does not match the image type.

sections.personalDesc: Your name, identity, and language preferences.
sections.aboutDesc: A short biography shown on your public profile.
sections.linksDesc: Your professional profiles around the web.
sections.academicDesc: Your education history and current studies.
sections.securityDesc: Change your password and manage active sessions.
sections.dangerZoneDesc: Export or delete your account data — these actions are irreversible.

fields.photoDesc: Shown across the platform on your profile and posts.
fields.name: Full name
fields.emailDesc: Your email cannot be changed here. Contact support if needed.
fields.biographyDesc: A brief intro that appears on your public profile.
fields.biographyPlaceholder: Tell others about your background, interests, and goals…
fields.preferredLanguageDesc: We'll send notifications and emails in this language.
fields.gpaDesc: Pick the scale, then enter your GPA.
fields.preferredCountriesDesc: Where do you want to study? We match scholarships in these countries to you.
fields.preferredFieldsDesc: Which subjects interest you? Used to rank scholarships by relevance.
fields.sessionFeeUsdDesc: What students pay you per session.
fields.expertiseTagsDesc: Add up to 20 tags — press Enter after each one.
fields.languagesDesc: Spoken languages your students can pick from.

validation.futureDate: Date cannot be in the future.
validation.sessionFeePositive: Session fee must be greater than 0.
validation.sessionFeeDecimals: Use at most two decimal places.

sso.passwordUnavailableDesc: Your account is signed in through a social provider, so there is no password to update here.
sso.manageWithProvider: Manage your sign-in with your provider.

password.title: Change Password
password.currentDesc: We use this to confirm it's you.
password.newDesc: 8–128 characters. Include upper, lower, a digit and a special character.
password.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
password.missingUpper: New password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
password.missingLower: New password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
password.missingDigit: New password must contain at least one digit.
password.missingSpecial: New password must contain at least one special character.
password.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current password.
password.success: Password changed. Other sessions have been signed out.

upgrade.cardDescription: Share your experience with other students and offer consultation sessions.
upgrade.pendingHint: An admin will review your request and you'll be notified once it's approved.
upgrade.modalSubtitle: Tell us about your background. An admin will review your request before your consultant profile goes live.
upgrade.success: Your consultant upgrade request has been submitted for admin review.
upgrade.errorConflict: You already have a pending consultant upgrade request.
upgrade.errorForbidden: Only active Student accounts can request a consultant upgrade.
upgrade.errorValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
upgrade.errorGeneric: Could not submit your upgrade request. Please try again.

fields.expertiseTagsPlaceholder: e.g. Statement of Purpose, Interview Prep

hints.tags: Press Enter or comma to add a tag. At least one required.
hints.languages: Press Enter or comma to add a language. At least one required.

validation.yearsRange: Enter a whole number between 0 and 80.
validation.atLeastOneTag: Add at least one expertise tag.
validation.feePositive: Session fee must be greater than 0.
